name: Cookiebot
description: Cookiebot — Automated cookie consent and compliance platform scanning, declaring, and controlling cookies for GDPR and CCPA.

seo.title: Cookiebot — Compliance Automation
seo.meta_description: Cookiebot: Cookiebot — Automated cookie consent and compliance platform scanning, declaring, and controlling cookies for GDPR and CCPA.

when_to_use: Automated cookie scan and GDPR consent banner for any site
Cookie declaration page generation with IAB TCF support
Prior consent enforcement blocking trackers until opt-in
CCPA opt-out mechanism for US California visitors
Compliance audit report export for DPA submissions

pros: Automatic monthly scan catalogues every cookie and tracker
Auto-blocking of non-consented cookies out of the box
Detailed cookie declaration page generated for you
cons: Page view-based pricing punishes high-traffic sites
Default UI customization limited on lower tiers
Scans of JavaScript-heavy SPAs can miss cookies
review.verdict: The default CMP for teams that want set-and-forget cookie compliance, if you can stomach traffic-based pricing.
review.best_for: Mid-sized sites that need automated cookie discovery and TCF
review.not_for: High-traffic publishers or teams needing flat-fee pricing predictability
